one_liner: Expedited inpatient admission with 21 hours left on the clock — criteria met, draft approve

service.description: Inpatient admission for community-acquired pneumonia with hypoxia

clinical_summary: 79M presenting with community-acquired pneumonia, SpO2 88% on room air, CURB-65 score 3, atrial fibrillation on anticoagulation. Admitting clinician documents expectation of IV antibiotics, oxygen support, and monitoring across at least two midnights given comorbidities and fall risk.

draft_decision.rationale: Two-midnight expectation documented by the admitting clinician; severity and comorbidities support inpatient intensity.
